mapper.select: SELECT user_oid, user_nm_korn, user_nm_eng, brdt, user_id, pswd, user_authrt, user_type, user_stts, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(eml_lcal, #{secretKey}) AS eml_lcal, eml_dmn, mpno_pfx, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(mpno_mid, #{secretKey}) AS mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, inst_oid, inst_nm, dept_cd, dept_nm, jbps_cd, jbps_nm, last_login_dt, lgn_fail_cnt, prvc_use_yn, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, trms_agre_yn, eml_rcptn_agre_yn, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y' AND user_authrt = 'ADMIN'
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.user SET
user_nm_korn = #{request.userNmKorn},
user_nm_eng = #{request.userNmEng},
brdt = #{request.brdt},
eml_lcal = #{request.emlLocal},
eml_dmn = #{request.emlDmn},
mpno_pfx = #{request.mpnoPfx},
mpno_mid = #{request.mpnoMid},
mpno_sfx = #{request.mpnoSfx},
dept_nm = #{request.deptNm},
jbps_nm = #{request.pstnNm},
mdfcn_id = #{principal.userId}, mdfcn_dt = IFNULL(#{request.updDt}, now()) WHERE user_oid = #{principal.userOid} AND user_id = #{principal.userId}
UPDATE ${schema}.user SET pswd = #{request.newPswd}, mdfcn_id = #{principal.userId}, mdfcn_dt = IFNULL(#{request.updDt}, now()) WHERE user_oid = #{principal.userOid} AND user_id = #{principal.userId}
